title: Shader Panorama For 1.21.5: Spring to Life
body:
A Panorama with shader and colorful topic title for 1.21.5.

Title remade by BlockBench.

Note:This is not generated based on the seed in the original background image.

The effect is shown in the picture.
![Effect](https://s21.ax1x.com/2025/04/17/pEhRlKP.png)
